untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by returns over a 3-12 month formation period and selecting top/bottom performers. This requires cross-sectional relative ranking logic and dynamic portfolio construction (long top decile, short bottom decile) which cannot be expressed as point-in-time indicator conditions on a single security. The backtest engine would need portfolio-level ranking, percentile bucketing, and multi-asset selection logic not supported by single-instrument condition rules.
translation_notes: Momentum ranking strategies require: (1) calculating returns over variable 3-12 month lookback windows, (2) ranking across entire stock universe, (3) selecting top N% for long, bottom N% for short, (4) dynamic rebalancing. This is a portfolio construction rule, not a single-security technical rule. A proper implementation requires a custom portfolio optimizer or ranking module, not condition-based entry/exit logic.
